title: MODELINV probe.cache.refresh Payload
description: Audit-event payload for a probe-cache refresh. cycle-102 Sprint 1 (T1.3 + T1.4). Emitted by model-probe-cache.{sh,py,ts} when the cache TTL expires AND a fresh probe is fired (synchronously OR via stale-while-revalidate background refresh per HC3). Lets operators answer: how often are providers being probed, what latency does each provider exhibit, and how often does the probe gate change verdict.

model.description: Model id used for the probe payload (1-token completion). May differ from the eventual invocation model when the probe is class-level.

outcome.description: Probe-ternary verdict per SDD section 4.2.2 HC5. AVAILABLE: probe succeeded under timeout budget. DEGRADED: probe succeeded but latency >= degraded_threshold OR rate-limit headers indicate quota pressure. FAIL: probe timeout or non-200.

latency_ms.description: Round-trip latency in ms for the probe call. Hard cap is timeout_seconds (default 2000ms).

error_class.description: Populated when outcome=DEGRADED or outcome=FAIL. Constrained to the typed taxonomy in model-error.schema.json (10 classes). cycle-102 Sprint 1 BB iter-1 FIND-002: an earlier draft used the synthetic value PROBE_LAYER_DEGRADED here, which would have failed schema validation at audit-emit. The probe-cache library now maps fail-open probe-layer outcomes to DEGRADED_PARTIAL (the correct typed class for 'invocation proceeds with WARN').

previous_outcome.description: The cached outcome that was replaced (if any). Lets audit-query detect AVAILABLE -> FAIL transitions.

cache_path.description: Per-runtime cache file path (e.g., .run/model-probe-cache/openai.json). Helps debug stale-lock / cross-runtime divergence.

stale_lock_recovered.description: True iff this refresh succeeded only after force-acquiring a stale flock (HC7). Indicates a previous holder died without releasing.

background_refresh.description: True iff this refresh fired via stale-while-revalidate (HC3) — caller did not block on it.

runtime.description: Which runtime fired this probe. Per SDD section 4.2.3 Option B, each runtime maintains its own cache; the audit log captures runtime to make the duplication-overhead bound (= 3x probes/min/provider) auditable.

ts_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the probe completion.
